metadata.method_A: Pure Claude (best economic reasoning, no Abel framework)
metadata.method_B: Claude + Abel (Markov blanket causal structure from real API calls)
metadata.workflow: Full 6-step per question: (1) Extract entities, (2) Generate hypotheses, (3) Abel API calls, (4) Verify alignment, (5) External (skipped), (6) Synthesize

results.text_snippet: Will AMERIBOR, an interest rate based on overnight loans made between banks on the American Financial Exchange, have inc...
results.A_reasoning: Fed easing cycle should push short-term interbank rates down
results.B_reasoning: Abel dual-parent: inflation channel dominates Fed easing for rate instruments

hypotheses.conventional: Fed easing cycle -> rates/yields decline (0 = not increased)
hypotheses.abel_dual_parent: Inflation channel can dominate Fed easing, pushing yields UP (1 = increased)
